title: Strolid Marketing Hooks and Sales Pitches
summary: This document outlines marketing hooks and sales pitches for Strolid, a company offering solutions to automotive dealerships. It highlights three key innovations: improving CRM insights with real customer conversations, instant lead routing, and leveraging AI without high costs, alongside three email templates focusing on follow-up, speed, and real-time opportunity detection.
text:
Jakes:
Hi [Dealer Name],
These are the top 3 Dealership Innovations You’re Not Getting Anywhere Else

1. Your CRM is lying to you — we show you what the customer actually said.
Notes hide the truth. Conversations don’t.
Every call, text, email, and chat is auto-summarized with real customer intent in your CRM for validation.

You see complaint spikes, price shoppers, and trade-in hesitation as they happen.

Dealers spend millions on traffic but almost nothing on understanding the conversations behind it — until now.

You know the top customer questions before your team reports them.

When your store can see every question, concern, objection, and opportunity across every rooftop… the game changes

2. Leads route instantly to the right person — not five minutes later.
Slow routing is killing stores, and most GMs don’t realize it.
Our update does the following:
Every lead hits the correct agent immediately.

No queues. No bottlenecks. No “Who’s got this lead?” nonsense.

Response times drop instantly, and appointment volume goes up.   
  
Calls in seconds because the magic happens on the phone

If a customer is waiting even 60 seconds, someone else has already won.

3. Full AI power without paying the “AI tax.”
You don’t need to spend millions on AI. We’ve already done that part
You get the power of advanced AI without the AI monthly bill everyone’s trying to justify.


We engineered it so you get those results today, without the massive AI spend.

The industry is pitching hyper-scale AI. Dealers don’t need hyper-scale AI, they need results. We deliver those today.
If you want to see exactly how these fixes work inside real conversations, I’ll show you.
 It takes five minutes — and it’ll change the way your store handles follow-up.
— [Your Name]
 Strolid
🚀 EMAIL 1: “You Don’t Have a Lead Problem.”
Angle: Follow-up truth + operational reality + curiosity hook.
Subject Options:
You don’t have a lead problem.

The truth your CRM isn’t showing you.

You might not like this… but it’s costing you deals.


Hi {{FirstName}},
Let me start with something every dealer knows but almost no one says out loud:
**Most dealerships don’t have a lead problem.
They have a follow-up problem.**
Every day, thousands of calls, texts, emails, and chats happen inside your store.
 The real question is:
Do you actually know what’s happening in those conversations?
Most stores don’t — and that’s where the losses pile up:
Leads sitting too long

Messages going unseen

Missed emails

Bad notes

Slow replies

Lost opportunities no one ever notices

That’s exactly what Strolid fixes.
We see — and summarize — every conversation, across every channel, automatically and put it in your CRM. 
No manual notes. 
We put the conversational notes in the CRM
No guessing.
No “Who’s working this lead?”
Just clean visibility into what’s really happening… and what needs to happen next.
If you’re ready to see where opportunities are slipping, I’ll show you exactly how your store stacks up.
Want me to run a conversation insight snapshot for your store?
— {{YourName}}
 Strolid | The Automotive Co-Pilot

🚀 EMAIL 2: “The Fastest BDC in Automotive.”
Angle: Speed-to-lead, dialer advantage, assignment rules, pure operational muscle.
Subject Options:
Speed wins. We engineered it.

Your leads shouldn’t sit in a queue.

We call faster than anyone. Here’s how.


I’ll keep this simple:
**Speed wins deals.
And no one calls or responds faster than Strolid.**
Most BDCs try to be fast.
 We engineered ourselves to always be fast.
Here’s why:
1. Our dialer connects instantly.
We don’t wait for agents to click around.
 We don’t queue leads.
 We don’t delay calls.
2. Our assignment rules eliminate the guessing.
 No “Who’s got this?”
 No bouncing leads between people.
 The right agent is assigned instantly — every time.
3. Our tech removes minutes dealers don’t realize they’re losing.
Minutes = money.
And most dealers bleed both without seeing it.
This is how Strolid became the fastest BDC in automotive — and why our partners consistently beat their competitors on first contact and appointment set rate.
If you want to see what ultra-fast follow-up looks like in your store, I can show you.
Want a quick walkthrough? 10 minutes is all it takes.
— {{YourName}}
 Strolid | The Automotive Co-Pilot

🚀 EMAIL 3: “See Every Opportunity — As It Happens.”
Angle: Unified communication + conversation intelligence + real-time alerts + “Dealer Brain.”
Subject Options:
Your hottest prospects shouldn’t wait for a report.

If you could see everything, what would you fix first?

Tomorrow is too late.


Hi {{FirstName}},
Let me ask you something most vendors never think about:
How many high-intent buyers did your team miss today?
Not last week.
Not last month.
Today.
Most stores have no way to answer that — because their tools only show them what someone typed, not what the customer actually said.
That’s why we built Strolid.
We unify every call, text, email, and chat your dealership has — and make it all searchable, trackable, and summarized.
Even better:
We notify you the moment a hot prospect shows real intent.
Not tomorrow.
Not in a weekly report.
Right. Now.
Complaint spikes?
Trade hesitations?
Objections?
Customers revealing they’re “shopping today”?
You see it in real time — automatically.
**Most vendors give you software.
We give you clarity.**
I’d love to show you a live demo.
Want me to send a few example insights so you can see what your CRM is missing?
{{YourName}}
Strolid | The Automotive Co-Pilot
